text: devar-yehva ׀ asher haya el-hovshe'a ben-beeri bimey 'uziya yovtam achaz yechizeqiya malekhey yehuda uvimey yarave'am ben-yovash melekh yiserael
techilat diber-yehva behovshe'a f vayomer yehva el-hovshe'a lekh qach-lekha eshet zenunim veyaledey zenunim ki-zano tizene haarets meacharey yehva
vayelekh vayiqach et-gomer bat-divelayim vatahar vateled-lov ben
vayomer yehva elayv qera shemov yizere'el ki-'ovd me'at ufaqadeti et-demey yizere'el 'al-beyt yehu vehishebati mamelekhut beyt yiserael
vehaya bayovm hahu veshavareti et-qeshet yiserael be'emeq yizere'el
vatahar 'ovd vateled bat vayomer lov qera shemah lo ruchama ki lo ovsif 'ovd arachem et-beyt yiserael ki-naso esa lahem
veet-beyt yehuda arachem vehovsha'etim bayhva eloheyhem velo ovshi'em beqeshet uvecherev uvemilechama besusim uvefarashim
vatigemol et-lo ruchama vatahar vateled ben
vayomer qera shemov lo 'ami ki atem lo 'ami veanokhi lo-eheye lakhem s
vehaya misepar beney-yiserael kechovl hayam asher lo-yimad velo yisafer vehaya bimeqovm asher-yeamer lahem lo-'ami atem yeamer lahem beney el-chay
veniqebetsu beney-yehuda uveney-yiserael yachedav vesamu lahem rosh echad ve'alu min-haarets ki gadovl yovm yizere'el
imeru laacheykhem 'ami velaachovteykhem ruchama
rivu veimekhem rivu ki-hi lo isheti veanokhi lo ishah vetaser zenuneyha mipaney venaafufeyha mibeyn shadeyha
pen-afeshitena 'aruma vehitsagetiha keyovm hivaledah vesametiha khamidebar veshatiha keerets tsiya vahamitiha batsama
veet-baneyha lo arachem ki-veney zenunim hema
ki zaneta imam hovisha hovratam ki amera elekha acharey meahavay noteney lachemi umeymay tsameri ufisheti shameni veshiquyay
lakhen hineni-sakh et-darekekh basirim vegadareti et-gederah unetivovteyha lo timetsa
veridefa et-meahaveyha velo-tasig otam uviqeshatam velo timetsa veamera elekha veashuva el-ishi harishovn ki tovv li az me'ata
vehi lo yade'a ki anokhi natati lah hadagan vehatirovsh vehayitsehar vekhesef hirebeyti lah vezahav 'asu laba'al
lakhen ashuv velaqacheti degani be'itov vetirovshi bemov'adov vehitsaleti tsameri ufisheti lekhasovt et-'erevatah
ve'ata agale et-navelutah le'eyney meahaveyha veish lo-yatsilena miyadi
vehishebati kal-mesovsah chagah chadeshah veshabatah vekhol mov'adah
vahashimoti gafenah uteenatah asher amera etena hema li asher natenu-li meahavay vesametim leya'ar vaakhalatam chayat hasade
ufaqadeti 'aleyha et-yemey habe'alim asher taqetir lahem vata'ad nizemah vecheleyatah vatelekh acharey meahaveyha veoti shakhecha neum-yehva f
lakhen hine anokhi mefateyha veholakhetiha hamidebar vedibareti 'al-libah
venatati lah et-kerameyha misham veet-'emeq 'akhovr lefetach tiqeva ve'aneta shama kimey ne'ureyha vikheyovm 'alotah meerets-mitserayim s
vehaya vayovm-hahu neum-yehva tiqerei ishi velo-tiqerei-li 'ovd ba'eli
vahasiroti et-shemovt habe'alim mipiha velo-yizakheru 'ovd bishemam
vekharati lahem berit bayovm hahu 'im-chayat hasade ve'im-'ovf hashamayim veremes haadama veqeshet vecherev umilechama eshebovr min-haarets vehishekavetim lavetach
veerasetikh li le'ovlam veerasetikh li betsedeq uvemishepat uvechesed uverachamim
veerasetikh li beemuna veyada'at et-yehva s
vehaya ׀ bayovm hahu e'ene neum-yehva e'ene et-hashamayim vehem ya'anu et-haarets
vehaarets ta'ane et-hadagan veet-hatirovsh veet-hayitsehar vehem ya'anu et-yizere'el
uzera'etiha li baarets verichameti et-lo ruchama veamareti lelo-'ami 'ami-ata vehu yomar elohay f
vayomer yehva elay 'ovd lekh ehav-isha ahuvat re'a umenaafet keahavat yehva et-beney yiserael vehem ponim el-elohim acherim veohavey ashishey 'anavim
vaekereha li bachamisha 'asar kasef vechomer se'orim veletekh se'orim
vaomar eleyha yamim rabim teshevi li lo tizeni velo tiheyi leish vegam-ani elayikh
ki ׀ yamim rabim yeshevu beney yiserael eyn melekh veeyn sar veeyn zevach veeyn matseva veeyn efovd uterafim
achar yashuvu beney yiserael uviqeshu et-yehva eloheyhem veet david malekam ufachadu el-yehva veel-tuvov beacharit hayamim f
shime'u devar-yehva beney yiserael ki riv layhva 'im-yovshevey haarets ki eyn-emet veeyn-chesed veeyn-da'at elohim baarets
alo vekhachesh veratsocha veganov venaof paratsu vedamim bedamim naga'u
'al-ken ׀ teeval haarets veumelal kal-yovshev bah bechayat hasade uve'ovf hashamayim vegam-degey hayam yeasefu
akh ish al-yarev veal-yovkhach ish ve'amekha kimerivey khohen
vekhashaleta hayovm vekhashal gam-navi 'imekha layela vedamiti imekha
nidemu 'ami mibeli hada'at ki-ata hada'at maaseta veemeasekha mikahen li vatishekach tovrat eloheykha eshekach baneykha gam-ani
kerubam ken chateu-li kevovdam beqalovn amir
chatat 'ami yokhelu veel-'aonam yiseu nafeshov
vehaya kha'am kakohen ufaqadeti 'alayv derakhayv uma'alalayv ashiv lov
veakhelu velo yiseba'u hizenu velo yiferotsu ki-et-yehva 'azevu lishemor
zenut veyayin vetirovsh yiqach-lev
'ami be'etsov yisheal umaqelov yagid lov ki rucha zenunim hite'a vayizenu mitachat eloheyhem
'al-rashey heharim yezabechu ve'al-hageva'ovt yeqateru tachat alovn velivene veela ki tovv tsilah 'al-ken tizeneyna benovteykhem vekhalovteykhem tenaafena
lo-efeqovd 'al-benovteykhem ki tizeneyna ve'al-kalovteykhem ki tenaafena ki-hem 'im-hazonovt yefaredu ve'im-haqedeshovt yezabechu ve'am lo-yavin yilavet
im-zone ata yiserael al-yeesham yehuda veal-tavou hagilegal veal-ta'alu beyt aven veal-tishave'u chay-yehva
ki kefara sorera sarar yiserael 'ata yire'em yehva kekheves bamerechav
chavur 'atsabim eferayim hanach-lov
sar saveam hazene hizenu ahavu hevu qalovn magineyha
tsarar rucha ovtah bikhenafeyha veyevoshu mizivechovtam s
shime'u-zot hakohanim vehaqeshivu ׀ beyt yiserael uveyt hamelekh haazinu ki lakhem hamishepat ki-fach heyitem lemitsepa vereshet perusa 'al-tavovr
veshachata setim he'emiqu vaani musar lekhulam
ani yada'eti eferayim veyiserael lo-nikhechad mimeni ki 'ata hizeneyta eferayim nitema yiserael
lo yitenu ma'aleleyhem lashuv el-eloheyhem ki rucha zenunim beqirebam veet-yehva lo yada'u
ve'ana geovn-yiserael befanayv veyiserael veeferayim yikashelu ba'aonam kashal gam-yehuda 'imam
betsonam uviveqaram yelekhu levaqesh et-yehva velo yimetsau chalats mehem
bayhva bagadu ki-vanim zarim yaladu 'ata yokhelem chodesh et-cheleqeyhem s
tiqe'u shovfar bagive'a chatsotsera barama hari'u beyt aven achareykha bineyamin
eferayim leshama tiheye beyovm tovkhecha beshivetey yiserael hovda'eti neemana
hayu sarey yehuda kemasigey gevul 'aleyhem eshepovkh kamayim 'everati
'ashuq eferayim retsuts mishepat ki hovil halakh acharey-tsav
vaani kha'ash leeferayim vekharaqav leveyt yehuda
vayare eferayim et-chaleyov vihuda et-mezorov vayelekh eferayim el-ashur vayishelach el-melekh yarev vehu lo yukhal lirepo lakhem velo-yigehe mikem mazovr
ki anokhi khashachal leeferayim vekhakefir leveyt yehuda ani ani eterof veelekh esa veeyn matsil
elekh ashuva el-meqovmi 'ad asher-yeeshemu uviqeshu fanay batsar lahem yeshacharuneni
lekhu venashuva el-yehva ki hu taraf veyirepaenu yakh veyachebeshenu
yechayenu miyomayim bayovm hashelishi yeqimenu venicheye lefanayv
venede'a niredefa lada'at et-yehva keshachar nakhovn movtsaov veyavov khageshem lanu kemaleqovsh yovre arets
ma e'eseh-lekha eferayim ma e'eseh-lekha yehuda vechasedekhem ka'anan-boqer vekhatal mashekim holekh
'al-ken chatsaveti baneviim haragetim beimerey-fi umishepateykha ovr yetse
ki chesed chafatseti velo-zavach veda'at elohim me'olovt
vehema keadam 'averu verit sham bagedu vi
gile'ad qireyat po'aley aven 'aquba midam
ukhechakey ish gedudim chever kohanim derekh yeratsechu-shekhema ki zima 'asu
beveyt yiserael raiti sha'aririya kh sha'aruriya q m zenut leeferayim nitema yiserael
gam-yehuda shat qatsir lakh beshuvi shevut 'ami f
kerafei leyiserael venigela 'aon eferayim vera'ovt shomerovn ki fa'alu shaqer veganav yavov pashat gedud bachuts
uval-yomeru lilevavam kal-ra'atam zakhareti 'ata sevavum ma'aleleyhem neged panay hayu
bera'atam yesamechu-melekh uvekhachasheyhem sarim
kulam menaafim kemov tanur bo'era meofe yishebovt me'ir milush batseq 'ad-chumetsatov
yovm malekenu hechelu sarim chamat miyayin mashakh yadov et-lotsetsim
ki-qerevu khatanur libam bearebam kal-halayela yashen ofehem boqer hu vo'er keesh lehava
kulam yechamu katanur veakhelu et-shofeteyhem kal-malekheyhem nafalu eyn-qore vahem elay
eferayim ba'amim hu yitebovlal eferayim haya 'uga beli hafukha
akhelu zarim kochov vehu lo yada' gam-seyva zareqa bov vehu lo yada'
ve'ana geovn-yiserael befanayv velo-shavu el-yehva eloheyhem velo viqeshuhu bekhal-zot
vayehi eferayim keyovna fovta eyn lev mitserayim qarau ashur halakhu
kaasher yelekhu eferovs 'aleyhem risheti ke'ovf hashamayim ovridem ayesirem keshema' la'adatam s
ovy lahem ki-nadedu mimeni shod lahem ki-fashe'u vi veanokhi efedem vehema diberu 'alay kezavim
velo-za'aqu elay belibam ki yeyelilu 'al-mishekevovtam 'al-dagan vetirovsh yitegovraru yasuru vi
vaani yisareti chizaqeti zerov'otam veelay yechashevu-ra'
yashuvu ׀ lo 'al hayu keqeshet remiya yipelu vacherev sareyhem miza'am leshovnam zov la'egam beerets mitserayim
el-chikekha shofar kanesher 'al-beyt yehva ya'an 'averu veriti ve'al-tovrati pasha'u
li yize'aqu elohay yeda'anukha yiserael
zanach yiserael tovv ovyev yiredefov ׃
hem himelikhu velo mimeni hesiru velo yada'eti kasepam uzehavam 'asu lahem 'atsabim lema'an yikaret
zanach 'egelekh shomerovn chara api bam 'ad-matay lo yukhelu niqayon
ki miyiserael vehu charash 'asahu velo elohim hu ki-shevavim yiheye 'egel shomerovn
ki rucha yizera'u vesufata yiqetsoru qama eyn-lov tsemach beli ya'aseh-qemach ulay ya'ase zarim yivela'uhu
nivela' yiserael 'ata hayu vagovyim kikheli eyn-chefets bov
ki-hema 'alu ashur pere bovded lov eferayim hitenu ahavim
gam ki-yitenu vagovyim 'ata aqabetsem vayachelu me'at mimasa melekh sarim
ki-hireba eferayim mizebechot lachato hayu-lov mizebechovt lachato
ekhtovv kh ekhetav-lov q ribov kh rubey q tovrati kemov-zar necheshavu
zivechey havehavay yizebechu vasar vayokhelu yehva lo ratsam 'ata yizekor 'aonam veyifeqod chatovtam hema mitserayim yashuvu
vayishekach yiserael et-'osehu vayiven heykhalovt vihuda hireba 'arim betsurovt veshilacheti-esh be'arayv veakhela aremenoteyha s
al-tisemach yiserael ׀ el-gil ka'amim ki zanita me'al eloheykha ahaveta etenan 'al kal-garenovt dagan
goren vayeqev lo yire'em vetirovsh yekhachesh bah
lo yeshevu beerets yehva veshav eferayim mitserayim uveashur tame yokhelu
lo-yisekhu layhva ׀ yayin velo ye'erevu-lov zivecheyhem kelechem ovnim lahem kal-okhelayv yitamau ki-lachemam lenafesham lo yavov beyt yehva ׃
mah-ta'asu leyovm mov'ed uleyovm chag-yehva
ki-hine halekhu mishod mitserayim teqabetsem mof teqaberem machemad lekhasepam qimovs yirashem chovcha beaholeyhem
bau ׀ yemey hapequda bau yemey hashilum yede'u yiserael evil hanavi meshuga' ish harucha 'al rov 'aonekha veraba masetema
tsofe eferayim 'im-elohay navi pach yaqovsh 'al-kal-derakhayv masetema beveyt elohayv
he'emiqu-shichetu kimey hagive'a yizekovr 'aonam yifeqovd chatovtam s
ka'anavim bamidebar matsati yiserael kevikura viteena bereshitah raiti avovteykhem hema bau va'al-pe'ovr vayinazeru laboshet vayiheyu shiqutsim keahovam
eferayim ka'ovf yite'ovfef kevovdam mileda umibeten umeherayovn
ki im-yegadelu et-beneyhem veshikaletim meadam ki-gam-ovy lahem besuri mehem
eferayim kaasher-raiti letsovr shetula venave veeferayim lehovtsi el-horeg banayv
ten-lahem yehva mah-titen ten-lahem rechem mashekil veshadayim tsomeqim
kal-ra'atam bagilegal ki-sham senetim 'al ro'a ma'aleleyhem mibeyti agareshem lo ovsef ahavatam kal-sareyhem sorerim
huka eferayim sharesham yavesh peri veli kh val-ya'asun q gam ki yeledun vehemati machamadey vitenam s
yimeasem elohay ki lo shame'u lov veyiheyu nodedim bagovyim s
gefen bovqeq yiserael peri yeshaveh-lov kerov lefireyov hireba lamizebechovt ketovv learetsov heytivu matsevovt
chalaq libam 'ata yeeshamu hu ya'arof mizebechovtam yeshoded matsevovtam
ki 'ata yomeru eyn melekh lanu ki lo yarenu et-yehva vehamelekh mah-ya'aseh-lanu
diberu devarim alovt shave karot berit ufarach karosh mishepat 'al talemey saday
le'egelovt beyt aven yaguru shekhan shomerovn ki-aval 'alayv 'amov ukhemarayv 'alayv yagilu 'al-kevovdov ki-gala mimenu
gam-ovtov leashur yuval minecha lemelekh yarev bashena eferayim yiqach veyevovsh yiserael me'atsatov
nideme shomerovn malekah keqetsef 'al-peney-mayim
venishemedu bamovt aven chatat yiserael qovts vedaredar ya'ale 'al-mizebechovtam veameru leharim kasunu velageva'ovt nifelu 'aleynu s
mimey hagive'a chatata yiserael sham 'amadu lo-tasigem bagive'a milechama 'al-beney 'aleva
beavati veesorem veusefu 'aleyhem 'amim beaseram lishetey 'eynotam kh 'ovnotam q
veeferayim 'egela melumada ohaveti ladush vaani 'avareti 'al-tuv tsavarah arekiv eferayim yacharovsh yehuda yesaded-lov ya'aqov
zire'u lakhem litsedaqa qitseru lefi-chesed niru lakhem nir ve'et liderovsh et-yehva 'ad-yavov veyore tsedeq lakhem
charashetem-resha' 'avelata qetsaretem akhaletem peri-khachash ki-vatacheta vedarekekha berov gibovreykha
veqam shaovn be'amekha vekhal-mivetsareykha yushad keshod shaleman beyt arevel beyovm milechama em 'al-banim rutasha
kakha 'asa lakhem beyt-el mipeney ra'at ra'atekhem bashachar nidemo nidema melekh yiserael
ki na'ar yiserael vaohavehu umimitserayim qarati liveni
qareu lahem ken halekhu mipeneyhem labe'alim yezabechu velapesilim yeqaterun
veanokhi tiregaleti leeferayim qacham 'al-zerov'otayv velo yade'u ki refatim
bechaveley adam emeshekhem ba'avotovt ahava vaeheye lahem kimerimey 'ol 'al lecheyhem veat elayv ovkhil
lo yashuv el-erets mitserayim veashur hu malekov ki meanu lashuv
vechala cherev be'arayv vekhileta vadayv veakhala mimo'atsovteyhem
ve'ami teluim limeshuvati veel-'al yiqerauhu yachad lo yerovmem ׃
eykh etenekha eferayim amagenekha yiserael eykh etenekha kheadema asimekha kitsevoyim nehepakh 'alay libi yachad nikhemeru nichumay
lo e'ese charovn api lo ashuv leshachet eferayim ki el anokhi velo-ish beqirebekha qadovsh velo avov be'ir
acharey yehva yelekhu keareye yisheag ki-hu yisheag veyecheredu vanim miyam
yecheredu khetsipovr mimitserayim ukheyovna meerets ashur vehovshavetim 'al-bateyhem neum-yehva s
sevavuni vekhachash eferayim uvemirema beyt yiserael vihuda 'od rad 'im-el ve'im-qedovshim neeman
eferayim ro'e rucha verodef qadim kal-hayovm kazav vashod yarebe uverit 'im-ashur yikherotu veshemen lemitserayim yuval
veriv layhva 'im-yehuda velifeqod 'al-ya'aqov kiderakhayv kema'alalayv yashiv lov
babeten 'aqav et-achiv uveovnov sara et-elohim
vayasar el-maleakh vayukhal bakha vayitechanen-lov beyt-el yimetsaenu vesham yedaber 'imanu
vayhva elohey hatsevaovt yehva zikherov
veata beloheykha tashuv chesed umishepat shemor veqave el-eloheykha tamid
kena'an beyadov mozeney mirema la'ashoq ahev
vayomer eferayim akh 'ashareti matsati ovn li kal-yegi'ay lo yimetseu-li 'aon asher-chete
veanokhi yehva eloheykha meerets mitserayim 'od ovshivekha vaohalim kimey mov'ed
vedibareti 'al-haneviim veanokhi chazovn hirebeyti uveyad haneviim adame
im-gile'ad aven akhe-shave hayu bagilegal shevarim zibechu gam mizebechovtam kegalim 'al talemey saday
vayiverach ya'aqov sede aram vaya'avod yiserael beisha uveisha shamar
uvenavi he'ela yehva et-yiserael mimitserayim uvenavi nishemar
hikhe'is eferayim tamerurim vedamayv 'alayv yitovsh vecherepatov yashiv lov adonayv
kedaber eferayim retet nasa hu beyiserael vayeesham baba'al vayamot
ve'ata ׀ yovsifu lachato vaya'esu lahem masekha mikasepam kitevunam 'atsabim ma'ase charashim kulo lahem hem omerim zovechey adam 'agalim yishaqun
lakhen yiheyu ka'anan-boqer vekhatal mashekim holekh kemots yeso'er migoren ukhe'ashan mearuba
veanokhi yehva eloheykha meerets mitserayim velohim zulati lo teda' umovshi'a ayin bileti
ani yeda'etikha bamidebar beerets taleuvovt
kemare'itam vayiseba'u save'u vayaram libam 'al-ken shekhechuni
vaehi lahem kemov-shachal kenamer 'al-derekh ashur
efegeshem kedov shakul veeqera' segovr libam veokhelem sham kelavi chayat hasade tevaqe'em
shichetekha yiserael ki-vi ve'ezerekha
ehi malekekha efov veyovshi'akha bekhal-'areykha veshofeteykha asher amareta tenah-li melekh vesarim
eten-lekha melekh beapi veeqach be'everati s
tsarur 'aon eferayim tsefuna chatatov
cheveley yovleda yavou lov hu-ven lo chakham ki-'et lo-ya'amod bemishebar banim
miyad sheovl efedem mimavet egealem ehi devareykha mavet ehi qatavekha sheovl nocham yisater me'eynay
ki hu ben achim yaferi yavov qadim rucha yehva mimidebar 'ole veyevovsh meqovrov veyecherav ma'eyanov hu yishese ovtsar kal-keli chemeda
teesham shomerovn ki mareta beloheyha bacherev yipolu 'oleleyhem yerutashu vehariyovtayv yevuqa'u f
uva yiserael 'ad yehva eloheykha ki khashaleta ba'aonekha
qechu 'imakhem devarim veshuvu el-yehva imeru elayv kal-tisa 'aon veqach-tovv uneshalema farim sefateynu
ashur ׀ lo yovshi'enu 'al-sus lo nirekav velo-nomar 'ovd eloheynu lema'ase yadeynu asher-bekha yerucham yatovm
erepa meshuvatam ohavem nedava ki shav api mimenu
eheye khatal leyiserael yiferach kashovshana veyakh sharashayv kalevanovn
yelekhu yoneqovtayv vihi khazayit hovdov vereycha lov kalevanovn
yashuvu yoshevey vetsilov yechayu dagan veyiferechu khagafen zikherov keyeyn levanovn s
eferayim mah-li 'ovd la'atsabim ani 'aniti vaashurenu ani kiverovsh ra'anan mimeni pereyekha nimetsa
mi chakham veyaven ele navovn veyeda'em ki-yesharim darekhey yehva vetsadiqim yelekhu vam ufoshe'im yikashelu vam
